name: Rope, Hempen (50 ft)
description: A coil of hempen rope. Has 2 hit points and can be burst with a DC 17 Strength check.

name: Torch
description: A torch burns for 1 hour, casting bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

name: Shortsword
description: Martial melee weapon. 1d6 piercing, Finesse, Light.

name: Chain Mail
description: Heavy armor. AC 16; Strength 13 required; disadvantage on Stealth.

name: Healer's Kit
description: Ten charges of bandages, salves, and splints. Spend one charge to stabilize a creature at 0 HP.
